tests.name: Health monitoring during deployment
tests.notes: Skill reliably triggers CronCreate usage. Main failure mode: models describe the loop pattern instead of creating it. Interval selection (5m) is correct ~90% of the time.

tests.name: Memory backlog watch during ingest
tests.notes: 30-minute interval is respected. The sub-minute → use daemon rule is recalled correctly ~75% of the time. Conditional alerting (pending < 10) is noted as a limitation of the current /loop implementation in most responses.

tests.name: Multi-system monitoring setup
tests.notes: Three separate loops with correct intervals is the encoded preference. Models merge into one loop ~30% of the time. Job ID reporting is consistent when CronCreate is actually called.
